svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="text-cell-overflow" name="Text Cell Overflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-424" dy="-197" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="0" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="800" pageHeight="600" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="frame" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="560" x="120" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="text-nowrap-overflow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#0f172a;" value="AWS-style diagram note text that should visibly overflow a narrow text cell" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="220" x="160" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="text-multiline-overflow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#17202A;" value="Long repository label<br>with a second line that is still too wide" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="160" x="410" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="text-fits" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#17202A;" value="Short label<br>fits fine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="260" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 70px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0f172a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#0f172a, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
